data.description: ticket_delete contains ~95 lines of Python inside a bash heredoc for the UNLINK scan + batch commit logic. Following the existing pattern for ticket-unblock.py, this should be extracted to a standalone Python helper (e.g., ticket-delete-unlink-scan.py) that is independently unit-testable. The file is now 2030+ lines and the trend is worsening with each new ticket operation.
data.title: ticket-lib-api.sh: ticket_delete UNLINK Python heredoc should be extracted to standalone helper
